heading: United States release from liability
label: 1967 United States release from liability
text: The United States shall not be liable for any debts, defaults, acts, or omissions of the Foundation nor shall the full faith and credit of the United States extend to any obligation of the Foundation.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 4217 of this titlePub. L. 119–65
